title: TikTok Video Scraper & Downloader
description: Scrape and download videos from one or more TikTok profiles.

profileUrls.title: TikTok Profile URLs
profileUrls.description: One or more TikTok profile URLs to scrape (e.g. https://www.tiktok.com/@username).

limit.title: Video Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of videos to retrieve per profile. Defaults to 10.

order.title: Sort Order
order.description: 'desc' returns the newest videos first; 'asc' returns the oldest videos first. Defaults to 'desc'.

downloadVideos.title: Download Videos
downloadVideos.description: When enabled, each MP4 is downloaded and saved to the Apify Key-Value Store. The public URL is added to the dataset record as 'storageUrl'.
